hero.title: Ranks & Progression
hero.intro: Our ranks describe how trust grows. Leadership keeps the halls rooted, middle leaders guard culture & momentum, and members rise through presence, kindness & shared runs.

progression.title: Progression
body: Progression reflects consistent conduct & community presence over time. Short bursts matter less than habits that return.
Questions & small issues start with middle leadership. Hall leaders handle hall-wide needs. Vice leaders coordinate across halls. Long-term direction & policy rest with the guild leader.

senior.title: Senior Leadership
senior.description: Top leaders care for member well-being and guide the guild's long path.

ranks.name: Guild Leader
body: A leader carries the guild's direction. The members are the body; without them, there is no guild.

ranks.name: Vice Leader
body: The vice leader is the guild's right hand, supporting the leader & stepping in when needed. They coordinate across halls and help direction become practical support.

ranks.name: Hall Leader
body: Hall leaders look after members within their hall. They oversee daily needs, support middle leadership & help every hall feel rooted and welcoming.

middle.title: Middle Leadership
middle.description: Team leaders guide guild teams directly and respond when members need help finding the next clear step.

ranks.name: Dharmapala
body: Dharmapala are the core of middle leadership, guarding the guild's culture & daily pace.

ranks.name: Lotus Warden
body: Lotus Wardens are the first line of support for members, helping with onboarding, answering questions & keeping the guild's culture alive through daily interactions.

ranks.name: Petal Keeper
body: Petal Keepers are a patient presence in the guild, supporting members through participation, helpfulness & kind conduct. They help keep the shared space positive for everyone.

members.title: Members
members.description: The heart of Mōchirīī. Member ranks are observed through consistent participation, conduct & contribution over time.

ranks.name: Mochi Blossom
body: Mochi Blossoms are veterans of the guild before entering leadership roles. They have seen the guild through multiple seasons & helped shape its culture with care.

ranks.name: Young Bamboo
body: Young Bamboo are the third rank of members. They have stayed awhile, contributed to the guild, and still have room to grow into long-term veterans.

ranks.name: Softwind
body: Softwind are the second rank of members. They know the guild's culture & community, while still early enough in the journey to keep growing.

ranks.name: Rice Sprout
body: Rice Sprout is the first rank of members. They are new to the guild and have shown promise through participation, conduct & care.
